title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Jawaharlal Nehru University Act, 1966. (2) It shall come into force on such date1as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 22nd April 1969, vide Notification No. S.O.1525, dated 21st April, 1969, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
